titleStmt.title: SII 23.577: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 577. (A.R. No. 577 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the 2nd, 3rd and 4th tiers of the west base of the same maṇḍapa

summary.p: The inscription comprises three disjointed pieces. This is much damaged. It purports to record a charter given by Bhujabala Vīranārāyaṇa Āhavamalladēva-Mahārāja to all the mahājanas of Pottapi-nāḍu, the nature of which is not clear. Mention is made of two families of Śōḻappāḍi supplying oil to the temple for lamps, who seem to have been deprived of some privileges enjoyed since the time of their forebears and hence threatened to commit suicide (?) and were dissuaded from such a step by Āhavamalla himself by restoring them now. We are not vouch-safed the details of this incident by the mutilated state of the record. The record is signed at the end by three officers of the king, two of whom are given as Divyādhikāri Bhāskara-Bhaṭṭōpādhyāya of the [Va]sishṭha-gōtra, son of Nārāyaṇārya and Vāsudēva-Bhaṭṭa, son of Appaṇa-Bhaṭṭōpādhyāya. The third whose name is lost is called the dharmādhikāri of Āhavamalladēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīmaccāḷikar vikramakālattu cāramākavum kūṭiṉa nāyaṟṟuk kiḻamai
pottappināṭṭu cernta A(ri)śeṣa mahājaṉaṅkaḷukku Āvatu Ivvūr mahājanaṅkaḷome Ivvūrilirun=ta kkirāmakkuṭi kuṭiyum

lai kiḻppakal taṅkaḷukku ṭiṇaṅka Uṅkaḷukku mulakā ḷḷutum kaṇattā rājarkku viṟṟuk ṉṟu Ivvūr mājaṉaṅkaḷ
karum viḷakkiraṇṭu kuṭiyu mivveṇṇai yiraṇṭu kuṭiyu miccoḻap pāṭi muṉṉāḷ Eṅkaḷ mutātikaḷ kuṭimulakaḷeṉṟu nāṅkaḷ maḻuveṟukiṟomeṉṟu śolla niṅkaḷ maḻuvetittarāttilai
k kaṭavikoḷeṉṟu Ā[ha*]vamalla yaṉeṉa keḻkaṟu kulattora tomākil In=tanira nūr yemākilameṉṟu ttil mahā

ṇattil bhaṭṭakaḷum pradhāṉikaḷum samasta pari krāhamum kāṇa Ivaṉai varom muven=ta(te)rkkum mahājaṉaṅkaḷ jayitta yattu Immahā jaṉaṅkaḷukku Āhavamalladeva mahārājāṉeṉ ja
ttukkuṭuttaṉa Ippaṭikku Iśśilāśāsaṉam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ bhuja balaviraṉārāyaṇa Āhavamalla devamahārājaṉeṉ ..
siṣṭhagotraja divyādhikāri bhāskarabhaṭṭopādhyāya nārāyaṇārya sūnu śrīmadappaṇa bhaṭṭopādhyāya sūnu vāsu devabhaṭṭoham
śrīmadāhavamalladeva dharmmādhi surabhaṭṭopādhyāya
Digital edition of SII 23.577 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
